abilities.description: Add one mana of any color.
If it's night, it becomes day. Otherwise, it becomes night. Activate only as a sorcery.

effect.description: If it's night, it becomes day. Otherwise, it becomes night. Activate only as a sorcery.
effect.name: DayTime

replacements.description: If it's neither day nor night, it becomes day as CARDNAME enters.

triggers.description: Whenever day becomes night or night becomes day, you gain 1 life. You may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.
